source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of synovial fibroblasts, indicating a fibroblast identity

GATA3 is the master transcription factor for Th2 T cell differentiation
KLRB1 (CD161) marks Th17/Tc17 and innate-like T cells
